IEntityWriteFilterCheckChangesAsync Method

One Identity Manager API Server
Called when changes to an entity are about to be made. The method should throw an exception for any invalid changes.

Namespace:  QBM.CompositionApi.DataSources
Assembly:  QBM.CompositionApi.Server (in QBM.CompositionApi.Server.dll) Version: 9.3 v93-311513
Syntax
C#
Copy
Task CheckChangesAsync(
	IEntity entity,
	IReadOnlyList<EntityWriteDataColumn> values,
	CancellationToken ct = null
)

Parameters

entity
Type: IEntity
Returns the entity which is about to be changed.
values
Type: System.Collections.GenericIReadOnlyListEntityWriteDataColumn
Returns change information.
ct (Optional)
Type: System.ThreadingCancellationToken
Supports cancellation.

Return Value

Type: Task
See Also

Reference

IEntityWriteFilter Interface
